description: Small daily budget ($50) competing on a high-demand search slot
user_message: I have $50 left in my daily budget and need to bid on slot_search_001 which has very competitive bids. What should I bid to stay competitive without blowing my budget?

ground_truth.reasoning: With $50 budget, max CPM spend is limited. Bid slightly above p50 competitor bid to win competitive share without over-spending.
